title: CIPS Level 2 Certificate in Procurement and Supply
subtitle: Entry point into CIPS procurement qualifications
short_description: Introduces the principles and context of procurement and supply — ideal for those starting out.
full_description: The CIPS Level 2 Certificate is the entry point into professional procurement. Covers procurement fundamentals, supply chain basics, and business operations over six months of structured study.

title: CIPS Level 3 Advanced Certificate in Procurement and Supply
subtitle: Operational knowledge for procurement roles
short_description: Contract administration, sourcing and supplier relationships.
full_description: Develops operational knowledge for those working in procurement roles. Covers sourcing and contracting, supplier relations, and operational procurement over 6–9 months.

title: CIPS Level 4 Diploma in Procurement and Supply
subtitle: Foundation diploma in professional procurement
short_description: The level most working professionals join. Eight modules, twelve months.
full_description: The operational-level CIPS diploma — widely required for procurement roles. Covers category management, contract law, risk and ethics, and supplier performance. Delivered by Bernard, CIPS Certified Trainer.

title: CIPS Level 5 Advanced Diploma in Procurement and Supply
subtitle: Strategic procurement for mid-career professionals
short_description: Procurement strategy, commercial negotiation, and leadership — required for MCIPS eligibility.
full_description: The strategic procurement qualification for mid-career professionals. Globally recognised and required for MCIPS eligibility. Covers procurement strategy, advanced contracting, and leadership.

title: CIPS Level 6 Professional Diploma in Procurement and Supply
subtitle: Professional-level CIPS procurement qualification
short_description: Strategic supply chain leadership — the final step to MCIPS.
full_description: The highest CIPS qualification — postgraduate level. Equips professionals for senior leadership roles in procurement and supply. Taught by Bernard and Eric, CIPS Certified Trainers.

title: ACCA Applied Knowledge
subtitle: Foundations of business, accounting and finance
short_description: Business, management accounting and financial accounting foundations.
full_description: The entry level to ACCA. Covers Business and Technology (BT), Management Accounting (MA), and Financial Accounting (FA) — accessible with no prior qualifications.

title: ACCA Applied Skills
subtitle: Technical skills across corporate reporting, audit and finance
short_description: Corporate reporting, taxation, audit, and financial management for professional roles.
full_description: Develops technical skills across corporate reporting, performance management, taxation, financial management, and audit — preparing you for professional finance roles.

title: ACCA Strategic Professional
subtitle: Strategic finance leadership and ACCA designation
short_description: Advanced reporting, risk and leadership for senior finance roles.
full_description: The final ACCA stage — Strategic Business Leader (SBL), Strategic Business Reporting (SBR), and Options papers. Produces strategic finance leaders with commercial acumen.

title: Project Management Professional (PMP) Prep
subtitle: Exam-focused PMP certification preparation
short_description: Exam-focused preparation with full mock sittings and study groups.
full_description: Structured PMP exam preparation with full mock sittings, study groups, and practitioner-led sessions. Finish in ten weeks with a clear path to PMI certification.

title: IAS/IFRS Financial Reporting Standards
subtitle: Apply international reporting standards in practice
short_description: Apply current standards to real statements, with worked examples.
full_description: Practical short course covering IAS and IFRS financial reporting standards with worked examples on real financial statements. Ideal for finance professionals updating their reporting knowledge.

title: Strategic Management & Leadership
subtitle: Lead teams and carry decisions through the organisation
short_description: Set direction, build a team and carry a decision through the organisation.
full_description: Applied leadership short course covering strategic direction, team building, and organisational decision-making. Designed for managers stepping into senior roles.
